archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Command Center variant)
design_philosophy: Information-dense, authoritative, and serious. The aesthetic must reflect a classified military intelligence dashboard. High contrast, distinct data visualization, and rigid grid layouts.

rules.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase text-zinc-100

typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' Tech approach adapted for military UI: Heavy, structured sans-serif (Chivo) for primary headings, sterile and highly readable sans (IBM Plex Sans) for body, and monospaced font (IBM Plex Mono) for coordinates, numbers, and tabular data.

colors.notes: Color is function only. The UI should be predominantly monochrome (obsidian and zinc tones). Accents like Red and Amber are reserved for alerts, active statuses, or primary actions.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.shadows: none, use 1px inner stroke for depth (e.g. shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)])
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict geometric alignment. Left-align data and forms. Center-align only high-level KPI values.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid Background (bg-zinc-950) with a hard bottom border (border-zinc-800).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border, no shadow.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.pdf_preview_area: Retro-Futuristic / Document simulation. White background for the actual PDF document page, set against the dark dashboard to signify physical paper print preview.

components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges (rounded-sm max). High contrast hover states. MUST include data-testid. Primary actions use the Amber primary color.
components.cards: Dense padding, strictly rectangular. Used for the 3 COG + Internasional summary panels.
components.tables: Dense rows, tabular numerals for dates/coordinates. Border-collapse style.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized. Dark backgrounds for inputs, white borders on focus. No HTML native selects or datepickers.
components.maps: Geoint map must use a dark/tactical tile style (e.g., Carto Dark Matter). OPM positions marked in signal red.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Minimalist axes, grid lines at 10% opacity. Colors linked to sentiment (Red=Negative, Green=Positive) for Medmon charts.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight for clear visibility at small sizes.

media.notes: No Unsplash images. Visuals should be exclusively derived from user-uploaded data, maps, and Recharts. The UI must feel like a functional military tool, not a marketing page.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA standards or minimum WCAG AA (4.5:1). All text over surfaces must be #A1A1AA or brighter.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK ENFORCEMENT: Use React Javascript (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. DO NOT USE TYPESCRIPT.
DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Create an information-dense 'Control Room' dashboard with 4 main panels representing the COG (Aceh, Jakarta, Papua) and Internasional.
FORMS: Build 6 distinct daily input forms for TIM LID, TIM KONTRA, TIM GAL, TIM MEDMON, TIM GEOINT, and PIKET. Ensure form state management can handle image uploads (converted to base64 for MongoDB).

PDF GENERATION: Implement a PDF generation view (max 2 pages) for Admin/Piket. The layout should mimic a classified military brief (e.g., white background, serif or clean sans-serif for print readability, structured grid for the infographic and summary text).
AI SUMMARY INTEGRATION: Prepare the UI skeleton and service structure for Claude Sonnet 4.5 API call handling the daily summary generation.
TESTING: Every form input, button, and navigation link MUST have a semantic data-testid.
AUTH: Implement JWT-based role mapping determining which form/dashboard view is accessible.
